violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025

The floor in the walk-in freezer has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

The door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023

Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Handwashing regulations were reviewed with employees at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine ice shield) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm . The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service at time of inspection and must not be used until it is cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

The doors to the outside, located in the kitchen and side door, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
